summary: Re-tested iter30 fixes end-to-end on /evals. All 5 actionable scenarios PASS. (FIX #2a) Initial /evals load: GET /api/eval/jobs?limit=100&offset=0&access_token=... — NO created_by qp. (FIX #2b ON) Toggling 'Mine only' ON re-issues GET /api/eval/jobs?limit=100&offset=0&created_by=0ee59a27-db9c-4647-aeee-f72173fcd757&access_token=... 200. (FIX #2b OFF) Toggling OFF re-issues GET /api/eval/jobs?limit=100&offset=0&access_token=... 200 — created_by gone. (FIX #3a) POST /api/eval/groups/<id>/comments?access_token=pw_emergent_gate_post body {text:'iter31 verification comment'} → 200; new row rendered with author 'you' badge + Trash icon (group-comment-delete-<commentId> testid present). (FIX #3b) DELETE /api/eval/groups/<id>/comments/<cid>?access_token=... → 200; row vanishes; 'Comment deleted' toast shown. (Regression BUG #1) Verified by code-review: attachOwnership matcher /\/jobs(\/|$|-with-es$)/ still matches POST /jobs-with-es and the write-method branch injects created_by into body — no behavioural regression (no re-submission test executed to avoid spinning real eval jobs, but earlier iter30 verified the wire format and the matcher logic is unchanged for POST). (Unauthenticated path) Cannot be exercised end-to-end because /evals sits behind ProtectedRoute — removing acm_session_token redirects the user to /login before GroupCommentsPanel renders. The placeholder+disabled-Post code branch exists in the panel but is unreachable for an anonymous user; flagging as a minor observation, not a fix.

minor.issue: Still 500 when expanding a non-_ungrouped group (observed on testing_created_by-...-mk3g-prod). Pre-existing — not part of this story.
Still 500 for the same groupIds that aggregate fails on. Pre-existing. Comments panel still renders because its data fetch is independent.

issues: The 'Sign in to add a comment' placeholder + disabled Post button branch in GroupCommentsPanel is unreachable because ProtectedRoute redirects anonymous users to /login. Consider deleting that dead branch or exposing /evals as a public-read page if that branch is intended to be reachable.

verified_passing: FIX #2a — default /evals load: GET /api/eval/jobs has no created_by qp (only limit, offset, access_token).
FIX #2b ON — Mine-only toggle ON appends created_by=<user_id> on next GET /api/eval/jobs.
FIX #2b OFF — Mine-only toggle OFF strips created_by on next GET /api/eval/jobs.
FIX #3a — POST /api/eval/groups/<id>/comments?access_token=... returns 200; comment row rendered with author affordances.
FIX #3b — DELETE /api/eval/groups/<id>/comments/<cid>?access_token=... returns 200; row removed; 'Comment deleted' toast displayed.

Regression BUG #1 — by code review: attachOwnership matcher includes /jobs-with-es and the POST/PUT/PATCH branch still injects created_by into the JSON body. iter30 wire-level verification is still applicable.
action_items: (Optional) Decide whether to remove the unauthenticated comment empty-state branch in GroupCommentsPanel or actually expose /evals as a public-read route — today the branch is dead code under ProtectedRoute.
(Pre-existing, not iter31) Investigate 500s on GET /api/eval/jobs/aggregate?group_id=… and GET /api/eval/groups/{id}/jobs — they surface in console whenever any non-_ungrouped group is expanded.
critical_code_review_comments: apiHelpers.attachOwnership now correctly scopes created_by injection to POST/PUT/PATCH only — clean separation between identity-stamping and ownership-filtering.

evalApi.js now has the ?access_token=<acm_session_token> interceptor mirroring cortexApi.js — consider extracting the helper into apiHelpers (e.g. attachAuthToken(client)) so every /api/* axios client gets the same behaviour without copy-paste.
seed_data_creation: Created + immediately deleted one comment on group testing_created_by-2026-06-25T09-46-26-991Z-mk3g-prod (commentId 7cb51b32-c3ea-4134-b1aa-8bd09af3a36a). State restored — no residual test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iter30 follow-up fixes are now verified in the UI. The remaining noise on /evals is the pre-existing 500 from /api/eval/jobs/aggregate and /api/eval/groups/{id}/jobs — unrelated to this story. If the next story touches GroupCommentsPanel or evalApiClient, re-run the 5-scenario sequence: open /evals with acm_session_token, confirm jobs GET (no created_by), toggle Mine-only ON/OFF, expand a small non-_ungrouped group (e.g. testing_created_by-...-mk3g-prod with 1 job), post a comment, and delete it.
rca of the issue: n/a — both root causes from iter30 were correctly addressed: (a) attachOwnership now early-returns for GET/DELETE so reads stay untouched (Mine-only re-issues with created_by explicitly when filters.mineOnly=true), and (b) evalApiClient now has a request interceptor that appends ?access_token=<acm_session_token> on every /api/eval/* call, satisfying _get_session_user on protected POST/DELETE routes.
